commit_message: Add static_cast<unsigned>(idx) / static_cast<unsigned>(i) narrowing casts in WarpSpecializeUtility.cpp to silence MSVC C4267 size_t->unsigned warnings
_curation_source: original_session.json 2 Edit tool_uses on lib/Conversion/TritonGPUToLLVM/WarpSpecializeUtility.cpp; both oldString anchors found verbatim in base 9a6af86 (lines 97, 249); replayed cleanly.
_curation_notes: Auto-extractor flagged anchor mismatch but in fact both anchors apply cleanly at base 9a6af86. Likely the extractor was checking the wrong file (relative-vs-absolute path) or stale workspace. After fresh clone + sparse checkout, edits apply on first try with no fuzz.
_verification_note: test.sh F2P gates compile-probe for static_cast<unsigned> narrowing in lowerBarrier/lowerCallOp (f2p_upstream_narrowing_barrier_callop, 0.20) and replaceAllUsesWith / getResult area (f2p_upstream_narrowing_secondary, 0.20). Patch adds those two casts.
_sync_note: Synced 2026-05-15 after hand-curate-B promotion (was previously a stub).

found_issues: files_changed_schema_minor_deviation: lacks `M\t` prefix and trailing newline relative to other canonicals; numstat field has correct format. Cosmetic.
no_current__review_block: only _review_pre_promote (stub-era) exists; promotion to real patch on 2026-05-15 left no fresh review.
_triple_check_round2.note: Promoted from stub to real diff 2026-05-15 (hand_curate_from_session). Single-file 2+/2- patch, header=1 matches files_changed_count=1. Static-cast<unsigned> narrowing changes align with test gates per _verification_note. Promotion is sound.

_review.note: Promoted from stub via hand_curate_from_session (anchor mismatch was spurious; oldString matched base verbatim). Round-2 r2-ai AGREE.
